---
title: ""
date: ""
---

### Journal

::: columns
::: {.column width="5%"}
\[1\]
:::

::: {.column width="95%"}
[Understanding Adolescent Mental Health Symptom Progression in School-Based Settings: The Substance Use and Risk Factors (SURF) Survey](https://psycnet.apa.org/doiLanding?doi=10.1037%2Fspq0000681) <br/>
Costello M. A., Pascale M. P., Potter, K., Knoll, S. J., **Bodolay, A.**, Kaur J., Du, R., ...<br/>
*School Psychology*, 2025. 
:::
:::

::: columns
::: {.column width="5%"}
\[2\]
:::

::: {.column width="95%"}
[Substance use, suicidal behaviors, and other mental health outcomes among youth with intersectional sexual and gender diverse identities](https://www.jaacapopen.org/article/S2949-7329(25)00001-8/fulltext) <br/>
Pachas, G. N., Reeder, H. T., Evins, A. E., Casottana, K., Borrego, M. M., **Bodolay, A.**, ... <br/>
*Journal of the American Academy of Child & Adolescent Psychiatry Open*, 2025.
:::
:::

::: columns
::: {.column width="5%"}
\[3\]
:::

::: {.column width="95%"}
[Intention to quit or reduce e-cigarettes, cannabis,and their co-use among a school-based sample of adolescents](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/38986353/) <br/>
Liu, J., Knoll, S. J., Pascale, M. P., Gray, C. A., **Bodolay, A.**, Potter, K. W., Gilman, J., ... <br/>
*Addictive Behaviors*, 157, 108101, 2024.
:::
:::

::: columns
::: {.column width="5%"}
\[4\]
:::

::: {.column width="95%"}
[A Pragmatic Clinical Effectiveness Trial of a Novel Alternative to Punishment for School-Based Substance Use Infractions: Study Protocol for the iDECIDE Curriculum](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/37670822/) <br/>
Gray, C. A., Iroegbulem, V., Deming, B., Butler, R., Howell, D., Pascale, M. P., **Bodolay, A.**, ... <br/>
*Frontiers in Public Health*, 11, 1203558, 2023.
:::
:::

### Abstracts

::: columns
::: {.column width="5%"}
\[1\]
:::

::: {.column width="95%"}
[Emotional Reactivity is a Transdiagnostic Risk Factor for Substance Use Initiation in Middle and High School Students](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0376871624005489) <br/> 
Costello, M., **Bodolay, A.**, Gray, C., Du, R., Potter, K., & Schuster, R. <br/> 
*Drug and Alcohol Dependence*, 267, 111623, 2025. 
:::
:::


::: columns
::: {.column width="5%"}
\[2\]
:::

::: {.column width="95%"}
[Co-Occurring Substance Use is a Marker for Greater Internalizing Symptoms Among Adolescents Meeting Screening Criteria for Depression or Anxiety](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?oi=bibs&cluster=8248853287771105728&btnI=1&hl=en&authuser=2) <br/> 
Jonathan, G., Evins, A. E., Gray, C., **Bodolay, A.**, Potter, K., & Schuster, R. <br/> 
*Drug and Alcohol Dependence*, 267, 111439, 2025. 
:::
:::




::: columns
::: {.column width="5%"}
\[3\]
:::

::: {.column width="95%"}
[Characteristics of Adolescents Presenting for a Pharmacotherapy Vaping Cessation Trial who Never Smoked Tobacco Regularly](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0376871624009074) <br/> 
Schuster, R., Cather, C., Pachas, G., Iroegbulem, V., Dufour, J. R., Casottana, K. D., ... <br/> 
*Drug and Alcohol Dependence*, 267, 111982, 2025.
:::
:::
